## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::BeerOff;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        BeerOff { size: 20, stroke: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
alcohol, bar, beverage, brewery, drink

## Categories
food-beverage
